description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on every push and pull request. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs, build-gcc-9 and build-clang-9, each with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations. For each job, clone DiligentTools and DiligentCore repositories, validate code format, install dependencies, configure CMake with specific compilers (GCC 9 or Clang 9), build the project, and run DiligentToolsTest.
